# The Vault by Nicole Strachan

> Luxury hair salon in New Canaan, Connecticut. Master color, Invisible Bead
> Extensions (IBE), Great Lengths & K-Tip extensions, keratin treatments, and
> luxury styling by hand-selected, certified artists. By appointment only.

- Address: 12 Burtis Avenue, New Canaan, CT 06840 (Fairfield County)
- Phone: (203) 228-5027
- Email: angie@thevaultnewcanaan.com
- Book online: https://thevaultnc.glossgenius.com/booking-flow
- Hours: Tue/Wed/Fri 9am-5pm, Thu 10am-8pm, Sat 8am-1pm; closed Sun & Mon
- Owner: Nicole Strachan — master colorist, IBE Elite Artist, former IBE National Platform Artist
- Artists: Lisa Becker (stylist & colorist), Olivia Martin (colorist & extension artist), Jenny Zavala (blowdries)
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/the_vault_new_canaan
- Starting prices: women's haircut $90+, glaze $65, balayage $415+, bleach & tone $245+, IBE 1 new row $375+, keratin $350+
- Full menu & pricing: https://freebyrd26.github.io/the-vault-salon/#services
- Cancellation policy: https://freebyrd26.github.io/the-vault-salon/policies.html
